Development.title: Request GitHub/GitLab Repository Access
Development.description: Raise a ticket with IT to get access to the company's version control repositories.

Development.title: Clone Core Repositories & Run Locally
Development.description: Clone the main project repos and verify the app runs on your local machine.

Development.title: Setup Development Environment
Development.description: Install Docker, Node.js, Python, or other required tools as per team stack.

Development.title: Install VS Code / IDE Extensions
Development.description: Install recommended extensions, linters, and formatters defined in project .vscode settings.

Development.title: Jira / Azure DevOps Access
Development.description: Request access to the team's project management and sprint board.

Development.title: Review Coding Standards & PR Guidelines
Development.description: Read the team's coding conventions, branch naming strategy, and PR review process.

Development.title: Meet Tech Lead & Understand Architecture
Development.description: Schedule a 1:1 with your tech lead to understand the system architecture and tech stack.

Development.title: Complete First Assigned Story/Ticket
Development.description: Pick up your first development ticket and complete it with a PR raised for review.

Development.title: Attend Sprint Planning / Stand-up
Development.description: Join the team's daily stand-up and sprint planning sessions.

QA.title: Request Jira / Zephyr Access
QA.description: Get access to the test management tool used by the QA team.

QA.title: Request Test Environment Access
QA.description: Get credentials and VPN access to QA/UAT environments.

QA.title: Review QA Process & Test Strategy
QA.description: Study the internal testing guidelines, test case templates, and methodologies.

QA.title: Meet QA Lead & Understand Active Projects
QA.description: Schedule a 1:1 with your QA lead to understand what projects are currently in testing.

QA.title: Setup Postman / API Testing Tools
QA.description: Install and configure API testing tools required by the team.

QA.title: Review Existing Test Cases
QA.description: Go through existing regression and smoke test suites for the assigned project.

QA.title: Execute First Test Cycle
QA.description: Run your first set of test cases and log defects in Jira.

Design.title: Join Corporate Figma Organization
Design.description: Request IT/Design Lead to add you to the company's Figma workspace.

Design.title: Request Adobe Creative Cloud Access
Design.description: Raise a request for Adobe CC license if required for your role.

Design.title: Study Design System & Component Library
Design.description: Review the core UI component library, design tokens, and KPMG brand guidelines.

Design.title: Meet Design Lead & Review Active Projects
Design.description: Schedule a 1:1 with the design lead to understand ongoing projects and your role.

Design.title: Review Brand Guidelines & Style Guide
Design.description: Go through KPMG brand guidelines, typography, color palettes, and usage rules.

Design.title: First Design Assignment
Design.description: Pick up your first design task, create wireframes or mockups and share for feedback.

HR.title: Access TalentKonnect HR Portal (Full Access)
HR.description: Verify full access to TalentKonnect for payroll, leaves, and HR requests.

HR.title: Understand Onboarding Process End-to-End
HR.description: Review the complete new joiner onboarding checklist and process owned by HR.

HR.title: Access HRMS / People Analytics Tool
HR.description: Get credentials for the HRMS system used by the team.

HR.title: Meet HR Business Partner
HR.description: Introduction with your HR BP who will be your primary point of contact.

HR.title: Review HR Policies & Employee Handbook
HR.description: Read and acknowledge the company's HR policies, leave policies, and code of conduct.

HR.title: Understand Payroll & Compensation Structure
HR.description: Get briefed on payroll cycles, salary components, and reimbursement processes.

HR.title: Assist in Next Batch Onboarding
HR.description: Shadow or assist in onboarding the next batch of new joiners to learn the process.

HR.title: Update Employee Records
HR.description: Verify and update all employee records for recent joiners in the HRMS system.

Finance.title: Access SAP / ERP Finance System
Finance.description: Request IT to provision access to the ERP/SAP system used by the Finance team.

Finance.title: Access Expense Management Tool
Finance.description: Get access to the expense management portal (Concur/Zoho Expense etc.).

Finance.title: Meet Finance Manager & Understand Team Structure
Finance.description: 1:1 with Finance Manager to understand the team's responsibilities and reporting structure.

Finance.title: Review Chart of Accounts & Coding Structure
Finance.description: Study the company's chart of accounts, cost centres, and project codes.

Finance.title: Understand Month-End Closing Process
Finance.description: Review the monthly financial close checklist and key deadlines.

Finance.title: Review Compliance & Internal Controls
Finance.description: Study KPMG's internal financial controls, audit requirements, and compliance checklists.

Finance.title: First Financial Report Preparation
Finance.description: Assist in preparing a standard financial report or reconciliation under supervision.

IT Support.title: Access IT Ticketing System (ServiceNow)
IT Support.description: Get full access to the IT helpdesk ticketing system to handle support requests.

IT Support.title: Access Network & Server Infrastructure Tools
IT Support.description: Get access to network monitoring, AD, and server management tools.

IT Support.title: Understand IT Asset Inventory
IT Support.description: Review the IT asset register and understand the device procurement and assignment process.

IT Support.title: Meet IT Manager & Understand Team Responsibilities
IT Support.description: Introduction with the IT manager and understand L1/L2/L3 support structure.

IT Support.title: Review IT Security Policies & SOPs
IT Support.description: Study the IT security policies, incident response plan, and standard operating procedures.

IT Support.title: Understand Laptop Setup & Provisioning Process
IT Support.description: Learn the standard process for setting up new employee laptops and software installation.

IT Support.title: Handle First Support Ticket
IT Support.description: Resolve your first assigned IT support ticket under supervision.

IT Support.title: Configure AVD / VPN Access for New Joiners
IT Support.description: Assist in setting up AVD and VPN for new joiners as per the IT checklist.

Marketing.title: Access Marketing Automation Tools
Marketing.description: Get access to tools like HubSpot, Marketo, or Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

Marketing.title: Access Social Media Management Platform
Marketing.description: Get credentials for the social media scheduling and analytics platform.

Marketing.title: Meet Marketing Lead & Review Campaign Calendar
Marketing.description: Introduction with the Marketing Manager and review the current campaign schedule.

Marketing.title: Study KPMG Brand Voice & Content Guidelines
Marketing.description: Review brand tone of voice, content templates, approval workflows, and compliance rules.

Marketing.title: Review Existing Campaign Performance Reports
Marketing.description: Study past campaign analytics to understand what's working and areas for improvement.

Marketing.title: First Content Assignment
Marketing.description: Draft your first piece of content (social post, blog, email) and submit for review.

Marketing.title: Attend Marketing Team Standup / Meeting
Marketing.description: Join the regular marketing team sync to understand ongoing campaigns and priorities.
